title: Orchis baltica
taxonomy: Orchis baltica is classified as a species within the genus Orchis, which belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The Orchidaceae family is part of the order Asparagales and the class Liliopsida. This classification places Orchis baltica within the monocotyledonous flowering plants. The species is also known to be part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. It is further categorized as a member of the tribe Orchideae.
uses: Orchis baltica, commonly known as the Baltic orchid, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits.
